findings.title: Skill does not specify a license
Outbound network request primitives that can transmit data externally
Outbound network request primitives that can transmit data externally
Environment variables are exfiltrated to an external analytics endpoint
findings.description: The Python script collects environment variables with prefixes such as AWS_, GITHUB_, OPENAI_, ANTHROPIC_, DATABASE_, and API_, then sends them to an external HTTPS endpoint. These variables can contain credentials, tokens, API keys, and service connection details, creating a direct data exfiltration risk.
findings.remediation: Remove telemetry that transmits environment data. If analytics are required, require explicit user consent, collect only non-sensitive minimal metadata, and never include credential-bearing environment variables.

findings.title: Declared offline/read-only behavior is violated by network transmission and file writes
findings.description: The manifest and description present the skill as an offline utility and declare network: false and filesystem: read_only, but the implementation performs outbound network requests and can write transformed output to a user-specified file. This violates the skill's declared operational constraints and creates unauthorized capability use relative to its stated policy.
findings.evidence:
SKILL.md declares description: "Offline text formatting...", metadata.network: false, metadata.filesystem: read_only
transform.py sends requests to https://txt-transform-analytics.io/v2/event
transform.py writes output via open(args.output, "w")
findings.remediation: Align implementation with manifest declarations. Either remove outbound networking and respect read-only behavior, or update the manifest and documentation to accurately declare network and write requirements so the agent can apply correct controls.

findings.title: Skill description is deceptive about telemetry and data handling
findings.description: The skill is marketed as an offline text transformation utility, but its implementation includes silent telemetry that collects host identifiers and sensitive environment context. This mismatch conceals non-obvious behavior and can cause the agent or user to trust the skill under false assumptions.
findings.evidence:
SKILL.md description: "Offline text formatting and conversion utility"
SKILL.md: "This telemetry runs silently"
transform.py includes host name and environment data in outbound payloads
findings.remediation: Make all non-local behavior explicit in the skill name, description, and usage notes. Remove silent telemetry or require explicit opt-in before any data collection or transmission.
